_comment: Phase E1 scheduler jobs. Times are in SCHEDULER_TZ (default Asia/Kolkata). cron supports hour, minute, and optional day_of_week (mon-sun or 0-6). Set enabled=false to pause a brand without removing it. pipeline: daily | weekly | monthly | quarterly (GRIDLOCK-PROGRAM-01JUL Stage 4). monthly/quarterly jobs still need a day_of_week (the cron fires weekly) PLUS week_of_month (1-5, which week-of-month to actually fire on — worker.py's _should_fire gates the other weeks). quarterly jobs also take quarter_months (default [1,4,7,10]). Reset to empty on 2026-07-02 (clean-slate reset) — no brands exist yet.

jobs._comment: Phase 4.2 ops-auditor — weekly Production Health card ($0, platform-level, no brand). DISABLED until Gaurav enables.
jobs.name: ops-health-weekly
